hooks.command: ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd); echo '=== Session Context ==='; echo "Branch: $(git -C "$ROOT" branch --show-current 2>/dev/null)"; echo 'Last 5 commits:'; git -C "$ROOT" log --oneline -5 2>/dev/null; LINT_ERRORS=$(cd "$ROOT" && yarn lint 2>&1 | grep -cE 'error' 2>/dev/null || echo 0); echo "Lint errors: $LINT_ERRORS"; MODIFIED=$(git -C "$ROOT" diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | head -10); [ -n "$MODIFIED" ] && echo 'Modified:' && echo "$MODIFIED" || true

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"CAVEMAN MODE ACTIVE. Drop articles, filler, pleasantries. Short synonyms. Fragments OK. Technical terms stay exact. Code blocks unchanged."}}'

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); CONTENT=$(jq -r '.tool_input.content // empty'); if [[ "$FILE" == */js/sections/*.js || "$FILE" == */js/sections/*.jsx ]]; then if echo "$CONTENT" | grep -qE "from [\"'][^\"']*/sections/"; then echo "BLOCKED: Section files cannot import from other js/sections/ files. Move shared logic to js/components/ and import via JsComponents alias."; exit 1; fi; fi

CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'git (commit|push)'; then echo '=== Commit Gate ==='; ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd); LINT_OUT=$(cd "$ROOT" && yarn lint 2>&1); LINT_ERRS=$(echo "$LINT_OUT" | grep -cE '^[[:space:]]*[0-9]+:[0-9]+[[:space:]]+error' || echo 0); if [ "$LINT_ERRS" -gt 0 ]; then echo '--- Lint errors ---'; echo "$LINT_OUT" | grep -E 'error' | head -15; echo "BLOCKED: $LINT_ERRS lint error(s) must be fixed before committing"; exit 1; fi; SECRETS=$(git diff --staged 2>/dev/null | grep -iE '(api_key|password|access_token|private_key)[[:space:]]*[=:][[:space:]]*[A-Za-z0-9_+/=-]{16,}' || true); if [ -n "$SECRETS" ]; then echo 'BLOCKED: Possible secret detected in staged diff:'; echo "$SECRETS"; exit 1; fi; echo 'Clean: commit allowed'; fi

CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '(shopify theme push|shopify:push|yarn deploy)'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Theme push is handled by yarn start (webpack watch) in a separate terminal. Never run shopify theme push / yarn shopify:push / yarn deploy from Claude. See .claude/rules/theme-push.md'; exit 2; fi

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [[ "$FILE" == *js/*.js || "$FILE" == *js/*.jsx ]]; then ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd); echo "=== ESLint: $(basename "$FILE") ==="; cd "$ROOT" && ./node_modules/.bin/eslint "$FILE" 2>&1 | head -30 || true; fi

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [[ "$FILE" == *.liquid ]]; then echo "=== Liquid Guard: $(basename "$FILE") ==="; ISSUES=0; if grep -nE '\{%[-]?[[:space:]]*include[[:space:]]' "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; then echo '  ^ ERROR: Use {% render %} with explicit named params, not {% include %}'; ISSUES=1; fi; NODEFERSCRIPTS=$(grep -nE '<script[^>]*>' "$FILE" 2>/dev/null | grep -v 'defer' | grep -v 'type="application/json"'); if [ -n "$NODEFERSCRIPTS" ]; then echo "$NODEFERSCRIPTS"; echo '  ^ WARN: <script> without defer attribute blocks section rendering'; ISSUES=1; fi; [ "$ISSUES" -eq 0 ] && echo 'OK'; fi

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [[ "$FILE" == *brief.md || "$FILE" == *test-scenarios.md || "$FILE" == *visual-qa-report.md || "$FILE" == *task-log.md || "$FILE" == *reuse-map.md ]]; then afplay /System/Library/Sounds/Glass.aiff 2>/dev/null; fi
